scripts.db:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/postgres.yaml && until kubectl get pod -l app=postgres 2>/dev/null | grep -q postgres; do sleep 2; done && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=postgres --timeout=120s
scripts.gitea:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea.yaml && until kubectl get pod -l app=gitea 2>/dev/null | grep -q gitea; do sleep 2; done && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=gitea --timeout=120s && (kubectl exec deploy/gitea -- su git -c 'gitea admin user create --admin --username lattik-admin --password lattik-local --email admin@lattik.local --must-change-password=false' 2>/dev/null || true) && kubectl delete job gitea-init --ignore-not-found && kubectl apply -f k8s/gitea-init.yaml
scripts.gitea:stop: kubectl delete -f k8s/gitea-init.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/gitea.yaml --ignore-not-found
scripts.trino:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/minio.yaml && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=minio --timeout=120s && kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/minio-init --timeout=120s && kubectl apply -f k8s/iceberg-rest.yaml && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=iceberg-rest --timeout=120s && kubectl apply -f k8s/trino.yaml && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=trino --timeout=300s && echo 'Trino ready at http://localhost:8080 (MinIO console: http://localhost:9001)'
scripts.trino:stop: kubectl delete -f k8s/trino.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/iceberg-rest.yaml --ignore-not-found && kubectl delete -f k8s/minio.yaml --ignore-not-found
scripts.airflow:start: kubectl apply -f k8s/airflow.yaml && kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/airflow-init --timeout=300s && kubectl wait --for=condition=ready pod -l app=airflow-api-server --timeout=300s && echo 'Airflow ready at http://localhost:8088 (no credentials — click Sign In)'
scripts.dev:up: pnpm cluster:up && pnpm db:start && pnpm gitea:start && pnpm trino:start && pnpm airflow:start
